title: agropyron biflorum subsp. latiglume
intro: Agropyron biflorum subsp. latiglume, also known as a subspecies of wheat grass or wheat grass variant, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Agropyron biflorum subsp. latiglume include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as juice or capsules, can be consumed to reap its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
